Release AAB build requested: 2026-07-16T04:00:00Z (v1.3.2 — EMERGENCY hotfix)
version: 1.3.2 (build name 1.3.2; versionCode = build-aab run number, strictly increasing)
signing: Play upload key SHA-1 EA:3B (from UPLOAD_* secrets / embedded)
package: com.whoisthere.app (matches Play Console)
severity: URGENT — the live public build (1.3.1) has a serious visual bug in
  friends games: the turn-based letter-guessing keyboard (added in 1.3.1)
  squeezes the game image down to nearly nothing on screen. Reported by real
  users on the live App Store release.
fix: the turn-based letter-guessing panel is hard-disabled via a kill switch
  (kLetterTurnFeatureEnabled = false in room_model.dart) for every mode
  except the separate letters-duel game (which was never affected — it has
  its own dedicated screen/mechanic, untouched). The host lobby toggle for
  this feature is hidden while the switch is off. No other 1.3.1 feature is
  touched or removed (groups, push invites, round-end scoreboard, tricks
  toggle, proverbs host-picked round count, round-image sharing all stay).
note: versionCode auto = build-aab run number.
trigger: session-branch push (MCP workflow_dispatch lacks actions:write)
